message.content:
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #b9a7ff
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #2aa198
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #d9ffd9
  ActorBorderColor #2aa198
  ActorBackgroundColor #d9ffd9
  BoxBorderColor #808080
  BoxBackgroundColor #d9d9d9
  ArrowColor #2aa198
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor Ctc as Ctc
participant TrackController as TrackController

box "Toggle Switch" #d9d9d9
  participant TrackModel as TrackModel
  participant Block as Block
  participant Switch as Switch
end box

Ctc -> Ctc : Select Block
Ctc -> TrackController : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
activate TrackController

TrackController -> TrackModel : setSwitchStatus(Block,direction)
activate TrackModel

TrackModel -> TrackModel : getBlock()
TrackModel -> Block : getSwitch()
activate Block

Block -> Switch : setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")
activate Switch
deactivate Switch

deactivate Block
deactivate TrackModel

Switch --> TrackController : new switch status
TrackController -> TrackController : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)
deactivate TrackController

TrackController --> Ctc : new switch status
Ctc -> Ctc : updateSwitchStatus(Block,status)

@enduml
